metadata.description: Pattern-based NPC name generation system with soft filtering
notes: Titles use soft filtering with weight multipliers based on social class
First names are categorized by gender and style (common, noble, mystical, etc.)
Surnames are categorized by culture and theme
Suffixes are epithets and titles of renown
Patterns determine name structure from simple to legendary
Base token not used (NPCs generate full names, not like weapons)
